indications.text:
1.1 Lower Respiratory Tract Infections
PRIMAXIN for intravenous use is indicated for the treatment of lower respiratory tract infections caused by
susceptible strains of Staphylococcus aureus (penicillinase-producing isolates), Acinetobacter species,
Enterobacter species, Escherichia coli, Haemophil...
